CreateSslVpnServer.vpnId: ID of the VPN gateway the server belongs to
CreateSslVpnServer.interfaceType: Network interface type: tun or tap
CreateSslVpnServer.localSubnets: Local subnet list (array of CIDR strings)
CreateSslVpnServer.remoteSubnet: Client address pool CIDR assigned to VPN clients
CreateSslVpnServer.clientDns: DNS address assigned to VPN clients
